ns0:entry.ns0:title: [pascal] joaopauloschuler/neural-api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/joaopauloschuler/neural-api
Language: pascal
CAI NEURAL API - Pascal based deep learning neural network API optimized for AVX, AVX2 and AVX512 instruction sets plus OpenCL capable devices including AMD, Intel and NVIDIA.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [html] NomaDamas/slides-grab
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NomaDamas/slides-grab
Language: html
Best harness + editor + linter for generating slides in Claude Code / Codex - Claude Design Open Source Alternative

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [go] alibaba/open-code-review
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alibaba/open-code-review
Language: go
Open-source & free — Battle-tested at Alibaba's scale. Hybrid architecture code review tool: deterministic pipelines + LLM Agent, precise line-level comments, built-in fine-tuned ruleset (NPE, thread-safety, XSS, SQL injection), OpenAI & Anthropic compatible.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [gap] Sqooky/OptimizationLock
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Sqooky/OptimizationLock
Language: gap
Collage of performance configs for deadlock with the intent of optimizing the game

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [typescript] AdventDevInc/kudu
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AdventDevInc/kudu
Language: typescript
Free Windows, Mac and Linux cleaner, scanner, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [typescript] agegr/pi-web
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/agegr/pi-web
Language: typescript
Web UI for the pi coding agent

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [php] TheHostingTool/TheHostingTool
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TheHostingTool/TheHostingTool
Language: php
A PHP-based, open-source, client management script geared towards free web hosting providers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [c] erincatto/box3d
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/erincatto/box3d
Language: c
Box3D is a 3D physics engine for games

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [vue] ys-ll/uniterm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ys-ll/uniterm
Language: vue
A lightweight all-in-one terminal with 20+ protocols — SSH, RDP, SFTP, databases and more. With a built-in autonomous AI Agent that plans and runs multi-turn shell commands.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [kotlin] AndyShaman/BYDMate
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AndyShaman/BYDMate
Language: kotlin
Android app for BYD DiLink 5.0: real consumption from BMS, GPS trips, charges journal, automation rules, floating widget, AI insights. Bilingual RU/EN. Tested on Leopard 3 / Fangchengbao Bao 3.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [kotlin] askimo-ai/askimo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/askimo-ai/askimo
Language: kotlin
AI Client for chat, RAG, plans, MCP tools, and agents with multi-provider model support.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [javascript] HughYau/qiushi-skill
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/HughYau/qiushi-skill
Language: javascript
求是Skill——从经典唯物辩证法与实践哲学中提炼出一条总原则和九大方法论工具武装AI大脑。Qiushi-Skill: Build agents that investigate first, focus on the main contradiction, validate in practice, and keep pushing until the work is actually done.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [javascript] sandeco/reversa
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sandeco/reversa
Language: javascript
Transform legacy systems into executable specifications for AI coding agents

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [qml] pnedyalkov91/advanced-weather-widget
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pnedyalkov91/advanced-weather-widget
Language: qml
Modern weather widget for KDE Plasma 6 with multi-provider support and rich customization options.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [c#] Gurge44/EndlessHostRoles
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Gurge44/EndlessHostRoles
Language: c%23
EHR is the biggest host-only mod for Among Us, with 450+ roles / add-ons and 16 game modes, along with a Custom Team Assigner application to fully customize your games!
